glosses.es: tarjeta de débito; tarjeta de cajero automático
glosses.ro: card de debit; card de bancomat
glosses.ja: キャッシュカード; デビットカード

sentences.target: Ich habe meine Bancomatkarte zu Hause vergessen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmaɪ̯nə baŋkoˈmaːtkaʁtə tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsən/

translations.de: Ich habe meine Bancomatkarte zu Hause vergessen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmaɪ̯nə baŋkoˈmaːtkaʁtə tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsən/
translations.en: I forgot my debit card at home.
translations.es: Olvidé mi tarjeta de débito en casa.
translations.fr: J'ai oublié ma carte bancaire à la maison.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato la carta Bancomat a casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把借记卡忘在家里了。
translations.yue: 我喺屋企唔記得帶提款卡。
translations.pt: Esqueci meu cartão de débito em casa.
translations.vi: Tôi để quên thẻ ghi nợ ở nhà.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn pinpas thuis vergeten.
translations.hi: मैं अपना डेबिट कार्ड घर पर भूल गया।
translations.el: Ξέχασα τη χρεωστική μου κάρτα στο σπίτι.
translations.id: Kartu debit saya tertinggal di rumah.
translations.ro: Am uitat cardul de debit acasă.
translations.da: Jeg har glemt mit Dankort derhjemme.
translations.ja: デビットカードを家に忘れました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, finite 1st person singular present; forms the perfect tense with the past participle.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular accusative; modifies the noun 'Bancomatkarte'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'vergessen'.
Preposition governing dative; part of the fixed locative expression 'zu Hause' (= at home).
Noun in dative singular within the fixed phrase 'zu Hause' expressing location.
Past participle (Partizip II) serving as the lexical verb in the perfect construction with 'habe'.

translations.en: The debit card isn’t working today.
translations.es: La tarjeta de débito no funciona hoy.
translations.fr: Ma carte bancaire ne marche pas aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La carta Bancomat oggi non funziona.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的借记卡今天用不了。
translations.yue: 我張提款卡今日用唔到。
translations.ru: Моя дебетовая карта сегодня не работает.
translations.pt: Meu cartão de débito não está funcionando hoje.
translations.he: כרטיס הדביט שלי לא עובד היום.
translations.vi: Thẻ ghi nợ của tôi hôm nay không dùng được.
translations.ar: بطاقة الخصم الخاصة بي لا تعمل היום.
translations.uk: Моя дебетова картка сьогодні не працює.
translations.hu: A betéti kártyám ma nem működik.
translations.hi: मेरा डेबिट कार्ड आज काम नहीं कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Moja karta debetowa dziś nie działa.
translations.el: Σήμερα η χρεωστική μου κάρτα δεν λειτουργεί.
translations.nb: Bankkortet mitt fungerer ikke i dag.
translations.id: Kartu debit saya tidak berfungsi hari ini.
translations.ro: Cardul meu de debit nu funcționează azi.
translations.da: Mit Dankort virker ikke i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はデビットカードが使えません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; syntactic subject of the clause.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; predicates the functioning of the subject.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time reference.
Negation particle; denies the proposition.

sentences.target: Ich zahle schnell mit der Bancomatkarte.

translations.de: Ich zahle schnell mit der Bancomatkarte.
translations.en: I’m paying quickly with the debit card.
translations.es: Pago rápido con la tarjeta de débito.
translations.fr: Je paie rapidement par carte bancaire.
translations.it: Pago rapidamente con la carta Bancomat.
translations.pt: Pago rápido com o cartão de débito.
translations.he: אני משלם מהר עם כרטיס דביט.
translations.vi: Tôi trả nhanh bằng thẻ ghi nợ.
translations.nl: Ik betaal snel met mijn pinpas.
translations.hi: मैं जल्दी से डेबिट कार्ड से भुगतान कर रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya bayar cepat pakai kartu debit.
translations.ro: Plătesc rapid cu cardul de debit.
translations.ja: デビットカードでさっと払います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; expresses the action of paying.
Manner adverb; modifies the verb 'zahle'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular dative; determiner of 'Bancomatkarte' after 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'mit'.

translations.en: My debit card is unfortunately blocked.
translations.es: Por desgracia, mi tarjeta de débito está bloqueada.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, ma carte bancaire est bloquée.
translations.it: Purtroppo la carta Bancomat è bloccata.
translations.zh-Hans: 不幸的是，我的借记卡被冻结了。
translations.yue: 可惜我張提款卡被凍結咗。
translations.ru: К сожалению, моя дебетовая карта заблокирована.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, meu cartão de débito está bloqueado.
translations.he: למרבה הצער, כרטיס הדביט שלי חסום.
translations.vi: Thật tiếc là thẻ ghi nợ của tôi đã bị khóa.
translations.ar: للأسف، بطاقة الخصم الخاصة بي مجمدة.
translations.uk: На жаль, мою дебетову картку заблоковано.
translations.hu: Sajnos a betéti kártyám le van tiltva.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्य से, मेरा डेबिट कार्ड बंद कर दिया गया है.
translations.pl: Niestety moja karta debetowa jest zablokowana.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, η χρεωστική μου κάρτα είναι μπλοκαρισμένη.
translations.ro: Din păcate, cardul meu de debit este blocat.
translations.cs: Bohužel je moje debetní karta zablokovaná.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、デビットカードが利用停止になっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Sentence adverb; expresses the speaker’s attitude (regret).
Predicate adjective (participle used adjectivally); denotes the state of the subject.

es: Olvidé mi tarjeta de débito en casa.

Ma carte bancaire ne marche pas aujourd'hui.
Je paie rapidement par carte bancaire.

La carta Bancomat oggi non funziona.

我的借记卡今天用不了。

我張提款卡今日用唔到。

אני משלם מהר עם כרטיס דביט.
למרבה הצער, כרטיס הדביט שלי חסום.
vi: Tôi để quên thẻ ghi nợ ở nhà.

Thật tiếc là thẻ ghi nợ của tôi đã bị khóa.

Ik betaal snel met mijn pinpas.

दुर्भाग्य से, मेरा डेबिट कार्ड बंद कर दिया गया है.
